title: Algorithm
description: A schema for storing an Algorithm as JSON
$comment: Schema-to-renderer name mapping (see GEOMETRY.md): Action→ActionStep, AwaitFunctionCall→AwaitActionStep, AsyncFunctionCall→AsyncActionStepNode, Function→FunctionStep, Loop→LoopStepNode, Decision→DecisionStepNode, Return→ReturnStep. Rendering notes: (1) Function rect displays 'name' only; 'description' is available for hover/tooltip. (2) Return pill displays 'label' if present, else 'valueExpression' if present, else stringified 'value', else empty.

description.description: A description of what the algorithm does

parameters.description: The input parameters accepted by this algorithm

steps.description: The root list of steps in the algorithm

Parameter.description: A named, typed parameter with an optional description and default value.

type.description: The data type of the parameter (e.g. string, number, boolean, object, array)

description.description: A description of what the parameter represents

default.description: An optional default value for the parameter (any type)

Step.description: Abstract base type for all step types. Discriminated by the 'type' property.

Action.description: A simple step that performs an action described by text.

txt.description: The text describing the action to perform

Loop.description: A step that repeats a sequence of steps.

steps.description: The steps to execute in each iteration of the loop

Decision.description: A step that branches execution based on a condition.

trueSteps.description: Steps to execute when the condition is true

falseSteps.description: Steps to execute when the condition is false

Function.description: A reusable named block of steps, callable by its ID.

id.description: A unique identifier for this function, referenced by AwaitFunctionCall and AsyncFunctionCall

name.description: A human-readable name for this function

description.description: A description of what this function does

parameters.description: The input parameters accepted by this function

steps.description: The steps that make up the function body

AwaitFunctionCall.description: A step that calls a Function by ID and blocks until it returns.

label.description: The display label rendered inside the step's rect

functionId.description: The ID of the Function to call and await

arguments.description: Key-value pairs mapping parameter names to argument values

AsyncFunctionCall.description: A step that calls a Function asynchronously, with success and failure handlers.

label.description: The display label rendered inside the step's rect

functionId.description: The ID of the Function to call asynchronously

arguments.description: Key-value pairs mapping parameter names to argument values

successSteps.description: Steps to execute if the async call succeeds

failedSteps.description: Steps to execute if the async call fails

Return.description: A step that returns from the current algorithm or function, optionally with a value.

label.description: The display label rendered inside the return pill. If omitted, the renderer should display valueExpression if present, otherwise stringify value, otherwise leave empty.

value.description: A literal return value (any type: string, number, boolean, object, or array)

valueExpression.description: An expression string evaluated as the return value (e.g. a variable reference or formula)
